metadata.description: A collection of claude code plugins used by SandyKid

plugins.name: git-commit
plugins.description: Smart git commit assistant: generates elegant commit messages, updates key docs, and manages version bumps

plugins.name: code-explorer
plugins.description: Systematically explore a module or feature across the codebase — finds all related files, maps entry points, traces dependencies and data flow, and produces a structured context summary ready for development, review, refactoring, or testing

plugins.name: doc-sync
plugins.description: 检查文档与代码的一致性，根据代码更新过时文档
